task_completion.description: Navigate to the Syslog Forwarding settings in ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer web interface with the 'Syslog Forwarding' or 'Log Forwarding' settings page open.

task_completion.description: Enter the target IP address for the SIEM collector.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing '10.200.50.25' entered into the Destination IP, Server Name, or equivalent field in the Syslog Forwarding configuration form.

task_completion.description: Enter the target port for the SIEM collector.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing '1514' entered into the Port field in the Syslog Forwarding configuration form.

task_completion.description: Select the UDP protocol for forwarding.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing 'UDP' selected from a dropdown menu or radio button for the Protocol setting in the Syslog Forwarding configuration form.

task_completion.description: Save the forwarding rule and ensure it is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the saved forwarding rule in the list of configured rules, displaying the correct IP (10.200.50.25), Port (1514), and Protocol (UDP), along with a status indicator showing it is 'Active', 'Enabled', or toggled on.

integrity.description: Agent used the EventLog Analyzer GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer web interface (menus, forms, buttons) rather than terminal commands, curl requests, or database scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to mock the expected output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration values (IP, port, protocol) are entered into the actual EventLog Analyzer application fields, not typed into a notepad, text editor, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: The configuration was genuinely saved in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show a confirmation message (e.g., 'Saved successfully') or the rule appearing in the application's persistent list of forwarding profiles, rather than just an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target IP address must be exactly '10.200.50.25'. The target port must be exactly '1514'. The protocol must be 'UDP'. The configuration must be performed within the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer interface and the rule must be saved and active.
